'''鈭歯g-s-th-b''' ('''kangastheboko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jaundice|jaundice]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-s-th-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-

| [[Wikt:jaundice|jaundice]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯g-s-th-b
|-
! Lemma
| kangastheboko
|}
